description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and mature trees. The front facade includes a small covered porch, flanked by shrubs and a paved driveway leading to the street. The roof has dormer windows, adding architectural interest and natural light to the attic space. The rear of the house is bordered by hedges and additional greenery, providing privacy and a natural boundary. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with a larger window bay at the rear. The property is set within a rectangular plot, with a driveway and walkway connecting the house to the street.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, a front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by lawn, trees, and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back wall, hedges, and dense greenery along the property boundary.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large bay window, extensive lawn, and the continuation of hedges and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rear steps, more trees, and the side entrance pathway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
